name: io.github.nirholas/intel-mcp
title: three.ws Intel
description: Coin smart-money scores, wallet reputation, signal feeds, and KOL leaderboards.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the intel endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live intel reads.
